home.heroTitle: Windows handmade in a Batumi workshop.
home.heroSub: Aluminium and PVC. Roman Sharashidze's workshop in Salibauri — since 1998.

configurator.metaDescription: Configure your window — product, material, price in one minute, no operator needed.

type.title: Product
type.heading: What are we building?
type.intro: Pick a product — window, door or more. Material comes next.

material.title: Material
material.heading: Which material?
material.intro: Per m² starting price under each option. Step 3 computes the final price from your real dimensions.
material.errorBody: Network or server didn't reply. We'll try again.

dimensions.title: Dimensions
dimensions.heading: Your opening size
dimensions.intro: Width and height in centimetres. The price updates as you type.

review.title: Review
review.heading: Your configuration
review.intro: Configuration, price, warranty — last look before we send it.

pricing.fixedFor14Days: Price including VAT · locked for 14 days
pricing.manualQuote: We'll quote the install separately — Roman calls within an hour

warranty.title: Warranty
warranty.description: On the full assembly, from manufacture through installation

leadTime.title: Lead time
leadTime.starts: Starts when the order is confirmed — Roman calls within an hour

cta.nextStepHint: Next step is just a phone number — nothing else

accessories.title: Accessories
accessories.heading: Hardware and finishing
accessories.intro: Handle, lock, sill, blind — pick what completes the package.
accessories.empty: Accessories are optional — skip if you don't need any.

handle.title: Handle
handle.doorRequired: A handle is required for doors

lock.title: Lock
lock.doorRequired: A lock is required for doors
lock.requiresCasement: Requires a casement or tilt-and-turn pane

accessories.errorBody: Network or server didn't reply. We'll try again.

color.title: Colour
color.heading: Colour or finish
color.intro: Colour or wood finish — for the façade and the room behind it.

dualColor.hint: Inside colour at 60% ⋅ separate inside only on PVC

color.errorBody: Network or server didn't reply. We'll try again.

glass.title: Glass
glass.heading: Glass layers and treatments
glass.intro: Layers and add-ons — pick what fits your home and your budget.

extras.label: Add-ons
extras.temperedDescription: Safety glass — breaks into small pieces
extras.tintedDescription: Reduces sun glare for seaside flats

glass.errorBody: Network or server didn't reply. We'll try again.

layout.title: Layout
layout.heading: Your window's structure
layout.intro: How many panes and how each one opens — fixed, casement, tilt or sliding. The price updates live.
layout.paneWidthHandleLabel: Width divider between pane {{from}} and pane {{to}}

dimensions.widthOutOfRange: Width must be between {{min}} and {{max}} cm
dimensions.heightOutOfRange: Height must be between {{min}} and {{max}} cm

layout.panesRequired: At least one pane is required.
layout.paneCount: Pane count must be between {{min}} and {{max}}.
layout.widthRatioSum: Pane widths must add up to the full width.
layout.doorTooManyFixed: A door may have at most one fixed pane (a sidelight).
layout.slidingInvalidOpening: Pane {{position}} can't use that opening — sliding systems allow only fixed or sliding.
layout.hingeForbidden: Pane {{position}} shouldn't have a hinge side.
layout.openingTypeInvalid: Pane {{position}} has an invalid opening type.
layout.hingeSideInvalid: Pane {{position}} has an invalid hinge side.

glass.notCompatibleWithMaterial: This glass isn't available with the chosen material.
glass.frostedTintedConflict: Frosted and tinted can't be applied to the same pane — pick one.
glass.extraInvalid: Pane {{position}} has an invalid glass add-on.

accessory.handleRequired: A handle is required for doors.
accessory.handleNoOpenablePane: A handle only fits on openable panes.
accessory.handleNotCompatible: This handle isn't available with the chosen material.
accessory.lockRequired: A lock is required for doors.
accessory.lockNotCompatibleProduct: This lock isn't available with the chosen product.
accessory.lockRequiresFullOpening: This lock requires a casement or tilt-and-turn pane.
accessory.sillLengthOutOfRange: Sill length must be between {{min}} and {{max}} cm.
accessory.blindNotCompatibleProduct: This blind isn't available with the chosen product.
accessory.blindControlNotSupported: This blind doesn't support that control type.

color.notCompatibleWithMaterial: This colour isn't available with the chosen material.
color.notCompatibleOuter: Outside colour isn't available with this material.
color.notCompatibleInner: Inside colour isn't available with this material.
color.dualOnlyOnPvc: Separate inside colour is PVC-only — aluminum is painted as a single colour.
color.ralCustomMissing: No colour was picked from the RAL palette.
color.ralCustomCodeInvalid: RAL code format is invalid — e.g. RAL 9016.

price.footnote: Step 3 computes the exact price from your real dimensions.
price.needSelections: Pick a product and material — the price will show immediately.

stub.title: Dimensions step is coming
stub.body: Step 3 — width and height, then Step 4-9: layout, glass, colour, accessories, order. Part of Phase 1 MVP.

catalog.metaDescription: Windows and doors handmade in a Batumi workshop — aluminium, PVC, sliding, panoramic, balcony glazing.
catalog.heading: Windows and doors handmade in a Batumi workshop.
catalog.intro: Five product families. Material, install, starting price visible per card. Pick one and the configurator takes over.
catalog.errorBody: Network or server didn't reply. We'll try again — if the problem persists, get in touch.
